name: Beef Diablo
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef arm or boneless pot roast (up to 4 lb)
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
Trim all excess fat from the roast. Place potatoes and onion in the bottom of
the Crock-Pot.
Make a smooth paste of flour, mustard, chili sauce, Worcestershire sauce,
vinegar, and sugar. Spread over the top of the roast (cut the roast in half,
if necessary, to fit easily). Place the roast on top of potatoes and onions.
Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours or on High for 5 to 6 hours.
